title: Brand Context Protocol — visual.md
description: Schema for BCP v0.2 visual.md daughter files. Defines structured fields for logos, color tokens, typography, and imagery principles.

parent.description: Path of the root file, typically /.well-known/brand.md

logo.description: Map of named logo entries. The key is the stable identifier an agent uses to reference this logo (e.g., 'primary', 'icon', 'app_icon').

logo_usage.description: Rules governing how any logo entry may be displayed.

forbidden_modifications.description: Binding list of modifications no agent may apply. Common entries: stretch, rotate, recolor, drop_shadow, glow, outline, crop, container_shape, animate.

color.description: Semantic color tokens. Keys are role names; values define the token.

context.description: Optional human-readable note on when this pairing applies.

families.description: Map of typeface entries. Keys are stable IDs ('display', 'body', 'mono').

roles.description: Map of usage roles to family IDs. Roles include: display, body, ui, mono, code.

additionalProperties.description: Family ID from the families map.

imagery.description: Principles for photographic and illustrative content. v0.2 keeps imagery prose-primary; future versions may schematize further.

extensions.description: Brand-specific or vendor-specific fields not covered by the core schema. Consumers MUST ignore extension fields they do not recognize.

description.description: Human-readable description of when this logo is used.

active_through.description: Optional sunset date. After this date, consumers SHOULD fall back to the entry named in 'fallback'.

fallback.description: Optional ID of another logo entry to use after active_through expires.

url.description: HTTPS URL where the asset is served. HTTP is not permitted.

sha256.description: Lowercase SHA-256 hash of the asset bytes. REQUIRED so consumers can verify integrity.

background.description: Background type or color this variant is designed against (e.g., 'transparent', 'white', 'brand-primary').

purpose.description: Free-form description of when an agent should select this variant.

color_token.description: Reference to a token name from color.tokens. Applies when type is solid_color.

min_contrast_ratio.description: WCAG contrast ratio required for this background. Applies when type is photographic.

fallback_stack.description: CSS fallback stack in priority order.

source.description: Where the typeface is licensed from (e.g., 'Adobe Fonts', 'Google Fonts', 'self-hosted').
